summary: First testing run for ParkPulse AI. Backend: 28/28 pytest cases PASS (auth, KPI, hotspots dbscan/hdbscan/kmeans, heatmap, predictions hour/day/week, feature importance, enforcement queue, Claude-Sonnet narrative generation incl. uniqueness, all 6 analytics endpoints, role-guard for /data/upload and /hotspots/recompute). Frontend: One-click demo login (admin + officer), executive KPIs, hotspot map (3 algos), enforcement AI brief flow (Claude generated unique briefs in ~6-7s), predictions, analytics, role-guard redirect all verified visually and programmatically. Total verified: ~95% functional. Only minor concern: hotspot circle click on map did not surface a right-side detail panel in automated test (may need real mouse-event delivery on Leaflet SVG path).

ui_bugs.issue: Programmatic click on a CircleMarker path did not open the right-side hotspot detail panel during automated test. Real user click likely works (CircleMarker uses react-leaflet onClick which expects a Leaflet pointer event). Worth manual verification by main agent.

action_items: Optional: Verify clicking a CircleMarker on the hotspot map opens the right detail panel during manual QA. Backend /api/hotspots returns rich data so the panel should populate.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py sets cookies with secure=False — acceptable for preview behind Emergent's TLS-terminating proxy but should be True in production.

auth.py login lockout keyed by 'client.host:email' — Kubernetes ingress may collapse all callers to a single proxy IP, effectively locking out the demo accounts cluster-wide after 5 bad attempts. Consider keying by email only or whitelisting demo accounts from lockout.
routes.py /api/hotspots/recompute is admin-only and synchronous; can block worker thread for ~30s — fine for demo, but for production consider running it as a background task.
llm_service.py has good fallback path; well structured.
test_credentials: admin@parkpulse.ai / ParkPulse@2026 (admin), officer@parkpulse.ai / Officer@2026 (officer) — both verified working via REST and via landing-cta-primary/secondary one-click buttons.
seed_data_creation: None. Backend auto-seeds the two demo accounts at startup (seed_admin_and_officer) and pre-loads 60k records from /app/data/violations.csv into in-memory state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pre-loads 60k records and pre-computes 250 DBSCAN / 412 HDBSCAN / 24 KMeans clusters at startup (~30s). All API endpoints under /api/* return JSON. Auth is httpOnly cookie based (axios withCredentials=true). Claude Sonnet 4.5 enforcement narrative endpoint /api/enforcement/{id}/narrative requires auth and returns within ~5-8s; falls back to a deterministic narrative if EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is unset. Verified Executive KPIs: 60000 violations / 250 hotspots / 2 critical / 41.3 avg score / 3.9% cap loss / 70 predicted hot 24h. Top stations: Upparpet 6923, Shivajinagar 5705, Malleshwaram 4476. Feature importance: Station 57.6%, Day 10.7%, Hour 31.7%. Hourly peak at 10-11 IST. Officer correctly redirected from /app/upload to /app/executive.
rca_of_the_issue: No critical bugs found. The only flagged UI behaviour (CircleMarker click not opening side panel via Playwright) is most likely a synthetic-event delivery limitation against Leaflet SVG paths rather than a real bug — manual user clicks should work.
